dialogos.texto_en: (A few days have passed\n since returning from the graduation trip.\n The day to finally head to Tokyo has arrived.)
Thanks for coming to see me off.
Well, of course I would come. It's the day my boyfriend\nis heading to Tokyo. You're my priority over any job.
N-no, work is important, right?
Don't worry.\nI haven't played hooky or forced a vacation,\nso you can rest assured.
Futaro-kun,\nyou're really going to Tokyo.\nI'm starting to feel it now.
I still don't feel it.\nIt's weird to think\nthat I won't be standing here for a while.
By the way, is this all your luggage?\nThere's so little of it?
Well, it's not like that's all there is.\nI sent the rest to my room.
Ahaha, I knew it. That's just like you.
Hey, I'm curious about\nwhat kind of place you're going to live in.\nSend me a photo once you're settled in.
Yeah.
Even though we won't be able\nto see each other for a while,\ndon't cry just because I'm not there for you.
I won't cry. Come on.
Ah, but, if you really want to cry,\nfeel free to call me anytime.
I said I won't cry.\nIt's not like it's a final goodbye or anything.
Are you sure?
You're being persistent.
(Even on a day like this,\n Ichika is acting the same way she always does.)
(Ah, but maybe,\n she's trying to reassure me in her own way.)
Well, we can still keep in touch even if we're apart,\nso it won't be too lonely.
Yeah.\nAnd%p-2;――
With this, I can remember you guys.\nI won't feel lonely.
Ah! The coaster made from minsa fabric.\nAre you carrying it with you?
Well, I don't always carry it with me, but%p-2;――
It's an important thing.\nI wanted to give it to you with my\nown two hands.
You're taking good care of it, aren't you.
It's a souvenir we bought together, right?\nI have to take care of it.
Me too. I want to put mine in a frame and display it.
Hey, what? Display it?\nWe made it into a coaster because \nwe wanted it to be used everyday, right?
I know, I know. Just making sure you're\ntaking good care of it.
Not just me, but everyone.
We struggled to choose a souvenir,\nbut it was worth it to get something nice.
Yeah, it was worth all the effort we put in.
It was a clever idea to choose Okinawan dyed fabric\ncoasters and let everyone choose their own\npatterns... It was a stroke of genius, don't you think?
Hmm, it was a good idea,\neven if I do say so myself!
Ultimately, you and I ended up with matching patterns,\nthough.
W-well, the pattern that you and I chose\nhas a special meaning...
That we'll be together forever.
That's the meaning behind it.\nWhen I found it, I thought there was no other choice.
I feel the same way.
You and I, we'll always be connected.\nUntil for ever and ever.
Yeah. No matter how far apart we are.
But, the day when we'll use these together\nisn't too far away.
...I'll be waiting for you in Tokyo.
Okay.
(When I'm with Ichika like this,\n I always want to keep talking.\n But, I can't just keep saying that.)
(We may be apart, but we're still connected\n by a strong bond. That's why%p-2;――%p;)
Alright, Ichika.
See ya.
Okay. See you, Futaro-kun.
